Landing.headlineStart: Launch, secure, and scale your business with
Landing.title: Magnetic digital services, engineered for global scale.
Landing.description: Modern digital services for growth, trust, and speed.
Landing.localeDescription: Language switching is already wired through admin-configurable active languages and instant locale routing.
Landing.identityDescription: Authentication, OTP sign-in groundwork, and premium account access are already connected for the next phases.
Landing.proofText: Clear offers. Fast trust. High-conviction service presentation.
Landing.panelTitle: Magnetic service ops in one clean layer.
Landing.panelDescription: Built to feel like a top-tier SaaS product while supporting real infrastructure, security, payment, and support operations behind the scenes.
Landing.panelMetricOneDescription: Service discovery, multilingual support, and trust-first presentation.
Landing.panelMetricTwoDescription: Operational readiness for AI workflows, automation, secure authentication, and future admin-driven orchestration.
Landing.panelMetricThreeDescription: Uptime visibility, backup readiness, support flows, and secure payment expansion prepared phase by phase.
Landing.partnersTitle: Powered by the infrastructure, payments, and trust layers global brands already rely on.
Landing.partnersDescription: A Magnetic service experience backed by the platforms customers already recognize and trust.
Landing.reviewsDescription: Real operators trust MagneticICT to elevate performance, security, reliability, and growth across the digital customer journey.

reviewContent.avaCarter: MagneticICT transformed our checkout reliability and site speed in weeks. It feels like having elite infrastructure, security, and growth teams under one roof.
reviewContent.noahBennett: The experience is premium in every sense. Strategy, execution, and support all moved with the clarity and rigor I usually only get from enterprise partners.
reviewContent.sophiaMartinez: Their AI-first approach helped us consolidate SEO, security, and performance into one operating system. Conversions improved almost immediately.
reviewContent.liamFoster: White-glove delivery, excellent communication, and genuinely high-level technical decisions. The polish matches the outcomes.
reviewContent.miaJohnson: Monitoring, backups, and security are now proactive instead of reactive. We finally have visibility and peace of mind across the whole stack.
reviewContent.ethanWalker: What impressed me most was the balance of speed and discipline. Nothing felt rushed, but everything moved fast.
reviewContent.charlotteKim: The landing experience, service clarity, and support responsiveness all feel distinctly Magnetic. It builds trust before a call even happens.
reviewContent.jamesPatel: We needed a partner who understood growth, infra, and security together. MagneticICT delivered exactly that, with serious attention to detail.

Footer.ctaTitle: Ready to architect your next Magnetic digital service stack?
Footer.ctaDescription: Partner with a team that blends AI engineering, infrastructure, security, and growth systems into one elite operating layer.
Footer.title: MagneticICT
Footer.description: Magnetic AI-led IT services for ambitious brands that demand speed, resilience, and remarkable customer experience.

Pages.servicesTitle: Curated infrastructure, security, and growth services.
Pages.servicesDescription: Explore a curated catalog built to help businesses secure, optimize, and scale their digital operations with confidence.
Pages.supportTitle: White-glove support for every high-stakes digital moment.
Pages.supportDescription: From onboarding to urgent incident response, our support experience is designed to feel proactive, clear, and deeply technical.
Pages.cartTitle: Your cart experience is ready for the next phase.
Pages.cartDescription: The shell is in place for an elegant slide-out cart, secure checkout orchestration, and premium payment experiences.
Pages.dashboardDescription: Your future workspace will centralize purchased services, billing, support context, and account controls inside a polished SaaS-grade portal.
Pages.dashboardRecentOrdersDescription: Track your purchased services, order status, and selected payment methods in one workspace.
Pages.dashboardEmptyOrders: No orders yet. Add a service tier and complete checkout to populate your workspace.
Pages.adminOrdersDescription: Review customer purchases, inspect lifecycle events, and manually mark fulfilled services when delivery is complete.
Pages.adminOrdersEmpty: No orders are available for admin review yet.
Pages.adminOrdersFulfillError: We couldn’t update this order right now.
Pages.adminOrdersSearchPlaceholder: Search by customer, service, tier, or invoice
Pages.adminOrdersFilteredEmpty: No orders match the current filters.
Pages.adminAccessDenied: You need an admin account to access this workspace.
Pages.adminDatabaseRequired: Configure DATABASE_URL and sync Prisma before using database-backed operations locally.
Pages.invoiceDescription: A polished billing summary for your purchased service tier, payment state, and lifecycle timeline.
Pages.adminOrderDetailDescription: Review lifecycle milestones, billing references, and customer context before taking manual fulfillment actions.
Pages.customerAuthDescription: Use Google or a one-time email verification code to access orders, invoices, support, and your Magnetic service dashboard.
Pages.customerAuthBenefitOne: Track purchases, invoices, and support status in one clean workspace.
Pages.customerAuthBenefitTwo: Use the same secure flow whether you are signing in or creating your customer account for the first time.
Pages.customerAuthBenefitThree: Jump straight into checkout, support, or your dashboard after authentication.
Pages.customerAuthGoogleDescription: Fast customer access with a familiar secure sign-in flow.
Pages.customerAuthOtpDescription: Request a 6-digit code to sign in or create your customer access instantly.
Pages.adminAuthDescription: Use your configured admin email and password to access operations, fulfillment, and order management.
Pages.adminAuthError: We couldn’t sign you in with those admin credentials.
Pages.adminAuthConfigError: Admin credentials are not configured on this deployment.

ServicesDetail.visualDescription: A premium delivery layer designed to look polished, feel trustworthy, and convert with confidence.
ServicesDetail.pricingTitle: Choose the service level that matches your growth stage.
ServicesDetail.pricingDescription: Every service is structured with premium tiers so you can start lean, expand with confidence, and scale into enterprise-grade support when needed.

Commerce.cartPageTitle: A clean cart designed for confident checkout.
Commerce.cartPageDescription: Review your selected services, compare tiers, and continue into a secure checkout experience built for clarity.
Commerce.emptyDescription: Add a service tier to start building your secure, high-conversion digital stack.
Commerce.authTitle: Authenticate to continue with your Magnetic order.
Commerce.authDescription: Choose Google sign-in or request a one-time email verification code to continue into checkout securely.
Commerce.googleDescription: Use your Google account for instant secure access and a faster checkout handoff.
Commerce.otpDescription: Enter your email address and we’ll send a secure 6-digit code for premium checkout access.
Commerce.otpVerifyDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your inbox to unlock checkout.
Commerce.otpRequestSuccess: Verification code sent. Check your inbox.
Commerce.otpRequestError: Unable to send a verification code right now.
Commerce.otpVerifyError: That code couldn’t be verified. Please try again.
Commerce.checkoutDescription: Choose your preferred payment method, review your selected services, and finalize a checkout flow designed for clarity and trust.
Commerce.checkoutEmptyDescription: Select at least one service tier before entering checkout.
Commerce.checkoutAuthenticated: You’re authenticated and ready to continue.
Commerce.checkoutAuthRequired: Authenticate to unlock payment and complete your order.
Commerce.paymentStripeDescription: Fast credit and debit card checkout experience.
Commerce.paymentPaypalDescription: A trusted wallet experience with buyer familiarity built in.
Commerce.paymentApplePayDescription: Frictionless wallet checkout for supported Apple devices.
Commerce.paymentGooglePayDescription: Fast, trusted wallet checkout for supported Google Pay browsers and devices.
Commerce.paymentWalletsDescription: Fast wallet-based checkout for supported devices and browsers.
Commerce.orderError: We couldn’t create your order right now. Please try again.
Commerce.checkoutSuccessTitle: Your premium order is on its way.
Commerce.checkoutSuccessDescription: Payment was verified and your order has been added to your workspace. You can now track it from the dashboard.
Commerce.checkoutSuccessPendingDescription: We received your return from the payment provider, but verification is still pending. Refresh shortly or check the dashboard.
Commerce.checkoutCancelDescription: Your order was not completed during checkout. You can review your cart, adjust payment options, and try again anytime.
Commerce.webhookPendingNote: Server-side payment reconciliation is enabled for supported providers.
